name: minimalist-monochrome
description: Editorial luxury design. Pure black and white only. Oversized Playfair Display serif. Hard section rules. Inversion as the only emphasis. No shadows, no radius, no color.
author: getdrip
signature_traits: Pure black #000000 and white #FFFFFF only — no accent colors
No shadows ever — depth from inversion and border weight
Hover inversion: black bg becomes white or vice versa
4px black horizontal rules between all major sections
Oversized Playfair Display headlines as typographic objects
Section texture layers mandatory — lines, grid, or diagonal
